rows.label: tlk47300162_01_msg0001
rows.name:
So! Our village's biggest
success story, the great Rex,
is back in town for once!

rows.label: tlk47300162_01_msg0002
rows.name:
What d'you think? Good wood,
eh? Liberalitas has few trees,
so we use each one fully.

rows.label: tlk47300162_01_msg0003
rows.name:
Same goes for the buildings an' all.
We fix 'em up, so they're in a decent
state for the next generation.

rows.label: tlk47300161_01_msg0004
rows.name:
That building at town's edge
is getting old, so they're
deciding what to use it for.
